column2: Review Finance View in the Legacy Order View
column3: Search the order ID in the legacy order search tool. When the order is opened, click on the Finance View tab in the upper middle of the order view

column2: Review the item under Wayfair Costs
column3: Scroll down to the Wayfair Costs Section, and look for the PO and OPID of the item returned (you can use control F to reverse search this information as well). In the Description Column, the item should reflect "Return"
When reviewing items in the finance view, review the column titled "PMT Status" - this section will indicate one of the following statuses: Paid: (Date) N/A Pending Voucher

column2: Identify Finance Partner Team Support based on Voucher Status
column3: Paid invoices indicate the item is post voucher, i.e. anything that reflects "Paid:(Date)" status, will be transferred to the Supplier Claims team (CR project in SupportHub) Unpaid/Pending invoices indicate the item is pre-voucher, i.e. anything that reflects "N/A" or "Pending Voucher" status, will be transferred to the Finance Operations team (FINSAP project in SupportHub) Please note: If you cannot find a Return line item related to the PO, this also goes to FINSAP
